title.en: China-to-Botswana Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入博茨瓦纳：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入波札那：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Botswana BOBS conformity requirements, BERA licensing and grid-connection conditions, BPC (Botswana Power Corporation) network access rules, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 62920 EMC, 50 Hz 230/400 V grid settings, and IEC 61727 / IEC 61000 series standards context — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与博茨瓦纳BOBS合格评定要求、BERA许可及并网条件、BPC（博茨瓦纳电力公司）电网接入规则、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V电网参数及IEC 61727 / IEC 61000系列标准背景——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與波札那BOBS合格評定要求、BERA許可及併網條件、BPC（波札那電力公司）電網接入規則、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 62920 EMC、50 Hz 230/400 V電網參數及IEC 61727 / IEC 61000系列標準背景——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BOBS conformity scope determination, BERA licensing approval, BPC grid-connection approval, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Botswana BOBS standards adoption, BERA licensing and grid-connection requirements, BPC network access conditions, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BOBS合格评定范围裁定、BERA许可批准、BPC并网批准、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行博茨瓦纳BOBS标准采纳状况、BERA许可及并网要求、BPC电网接入条件及项目业主要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BOBS合格評定範圍裁定、BERA許可批准、BPC併網批准、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行波札那BOBS標準採納狀況、BERA許可及併網要求、BPC電網接入條件及項目業主要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Botswana, the key practical gaps are: (1) BOBS (Botswana Bureau of Standards) conformity — Botswana Standards (BOS) generally adopt IEC; exporters must confirm whether the specific inverter model falls within any mandatory BOBS conformity assessment scheme and obtain applicable conformity evidence; (2) BERA (Botswana Energy Regulatory Authority) licensing — grid-tied solar PV generation requires a BERA generation licence or exemption; equipment must meet BERA technical conditions; (3) BPC (Botswana Power Corporation) grid-connection — BPC sets network access and connection conditions including anti-islanding (IEC 62116), safety (IEC 62109-1/-2), and grid parameter compliance for 230/400 V 50 Hz; (4) IEC 62920 EMC evidence for power conversion equipment; and (5) firmware validation against Botswana's 230/400 V, 50 Hz grid — not the 220/380 V parameters of the Chinese grid. China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy BERA / BPC IEC-referenced grid-connection requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口博茨瓦纳时，主要实际差距包括：（1）BOBS（博茨瓦纳标准局）合格评定——博茨瓦纳标准（BOS）通常采纳IEC；出口商须确认特定逆变器型号是否属于任何强制性BOBS合格评定方案并取得适用合规证据；（2）BERA（博茨瓦纳能源监管局）许可——并网太阳能光伏发电需要BERA发电许可或豁免；设备须符合BERA技术条件；（3）BPC（博茨瓦纳电力公司）并网——BPC规定电网接入条件，包括230/400 V 50 Hz的防孤岛（IEC 62116）、安全（IEC 62109-1/-2）和电网参数合规；（4）功率变换设备的IEC 62920 EMC证据；（5）针对博茨瓦纳230/400 V、50 Hz电网而非中国220/380 V电网参数的固件验证。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足BERA/BPC的IEC并网要求，不可在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口波札那時，主要實際差距包括：（1）BOBS（波札那標準局）合格評定——波札那標準（BOS）通常採納IEC；出口商須確認特定逆變器型號是否屬於任何強制性BOBS合格評定方案並取得適用合規證據；（2）BERA（波札那能源監管局）許可——併網太陽能光伏發電需要BERA發電許可或豁免；設備須符合BERA技術條件；（3）BPC（波札那電力公司）併網——BPC規定電網接入條件，包括230/400 V 50 Hz的防孤島（IEC 62116）、安全（IEC 62109-1/-2）和電網參數合規；（4）功率轉換設備的IEC 62920 EMC證據；（5）針對波札那230/400 V、50 Hz電網而非中國220/380 V電網參數的韌體驗證。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足BERA/BPC的IEC併網要求，不可在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
